platforms.label: YouTube Shorts
platforms.bio: LoveTypes Heart-Language Garden | Take the 15-question quiz to find your emotional guardian.
platforms.pinnedComment:
Take the 15-question quiz to find your emotional guardian: https://lovetypes.tw/start/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social_profile&utm_campaign=first_round_quiz_completion&utm_content=youtube_shorts_bio
Comment A/B/C and we will point you to a guardian route.
platforms.linkLimitNote: YouTube is the first-round English channel; the channel bio, descriptions, and pinned comments can use the full tracking link.
verificationSteps: 貼上 profile link 後，從平台畫面點擊或複製連結。
確認瀏覽器抵達 https://lovetypes.tw/start/，且沒有 404。
確認 Bio / 置頂留言只有測驗 CTA，沒有 Luna、聯盟書卷、診斷或療效承諾。
保存截圖或公開點擊紀錄，proof note 必須含 screenshot / public URL / clicked / verified 等可追溯詞。
platforms.writebackCommand: python3 tools/promotion_profile_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --status set --set-date 2026-06-30 --proof-note "<REAL_SCREENSHOT_OR_PROFILE_CLICK_NOTE> verified"
platforms.liveCommand: python3 tools/promotion_profile_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --status live --set-date 2026-06-30 --proof-note "<REAL_PROFILE_CLICK_NOTE> verified"
platforms.importTemplate:
LoveTypes profile setup writeback
platform: youtube_shorts
status: set
set_date: 2026-06-30
profile_link: https://lovetypes.tw/start/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social_profile&utm_campaign=first_round_quiz_completion&utm_content=youtube_shorts_bio
proof_note: <REAL_SCREENSHOT_OR_PROFILE_CLICK_NOTE> verified

rules.publishGate: 目前活動平台的 profile link 都完成 set/live 並通過 gate 後，才發布第一批 Shorts。
rules.singleCta: 平台個人頁先只承接 15 題測驗，不直接導購。
rules.noFakeProof: 沒有外部平台截圖、公開點擊或可追溯紀錄時，不回填 set/live。
